name: Warrior Gold Inc.
summary: Warrior Gold Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral resource properties with a focus on gold deposits and precious metals in Canada. It holds a 100% interest in its principal project the Goodfish-Kirana property that comprises 28 patented claims with 233 operational cells covering an area of 4,122 hectares located in Kirkland Lake, Ontario. The company was formerly known as War Eagle Mining Company Inc. and changed its name to Warrior Gold Inc. in September 2018. The company was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
